name: How to Prepare for a Funding Readiness Review
description: A public-safe checklist for preparing common information before requesting a funding-readiness review.

step.name: Confirm business basics
step.text: Gather your legal business name, entity type, EIN status, business address, owner details, and operating history.

step.name: Collect revenue proof
step.text: Prepare recent bank statements, platform sales reports, invoices, merchant processing records, or other documents that support your revenue range.

step.name: Review bank activity
step.text: Check deposit consistency, recent overdrafts or NSFs, negative balance days, and whether business deposits flow through the correct account.

step.name: Clarify funding purpose
step.text: Write a plain-language explanation of the funding use case, requested amount, timing, and expected business impact.

step.name: Request review if appropriate
step.text: Use the scorecard result to decide whether to request human review now or follow a prep-first path before review. Human review is not an approval or funding offer.
